{{Infobox character
| name = Bliss of the Blackwatch
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
| name = Bliss of the Blackwatch
| aliases = Bliss
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Guild Head, leader, superior, Head of the Blackwatch Guild, Steward
| abilities = change her location, cleanse her blood to remove foreign agents
| affiliations = Blackwatch
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

''See also: [[Bliss of the Blackwatch Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bliss is the Head of the [[Blackwatch Guild]], an organization dedicated to studying [[Elders]] and utilizing their powers for the benefit of humanity. As a leader, she is characterized by an otherworldly appearance, featuring pale skin, white-blond hair, and eyes that can emit a pale light. Her presence is often described as intimidating or frightening, radiating an intense desire for change and a rejection of natural laws. Despite her status as a [[Guild]] Head, she is noted for having a quirky and sometimes unpredictable personality. In combat and duty, Bliss utilizes specialized equipment, including a long spear of yellowed bone known as the [[Spear of Tharlos]] and [[Blackwatch spikes]]—ancient iron nails used to pin down or seal [[Elderspawn]]. Her attire consists of a long black coat adorned with silver buttons, each etched with the [[Blackwatch]] crest: a mass of tentacles overlaid by six inhuman eyes. Bliss has been involved in significant conflicts, including confrontations with the Head Alchemist and various [[Consultants]], and she has demonstrated the ability to use powerful countermeasures to protect others or contain Elder-related threats.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is a superior within the [[Blackwatch]] and serves as the [[Guild]] Head, though [[Calder]] [[Marten]] once feared encountering her and believed she was dead. Characterized by pale skin, white-blond hair, and a long black coat adorned with silver [[Blackwatch]] Crest buttons, she carries a [[Spear of Tharlos]]. When her eyes open after being briefly closed, they shine with a pale light. During discussions regarding the new Emperor, Bliss remains present and expresses her conviction that a world lacking an Emperor would face grave danger. While participating in these matters, she was noted to be fixated on a small butterfly made of blown glass.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is an individual [[Calder]] [[Marten]] was afraid of running into.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss possesses a [[Spear of Tharlos]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is the [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is expected to return soon.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss has pale eyes, pale skin, and white-blond hair.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss wears a long black coat with silver buttons etched with the [[Blackwatch]] Crest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is dead according to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is a girl with white-blond hair who was hiding in [[Calder]]'s clothes chest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss's eyes shine with a pale light when she opens them after closing them briefly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is a leader or superior within the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss believes a world without an Emperor would be in grave danger.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss was fixated on a tiny butterfly of blown glass.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss is present during the discussion about the new Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Bliss is the Head of the [[Blackwatch Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a pale-haired woman wearing a [[Blackwatch coat]] who serves as a commanding [[Guild]] member aboard the ship known as [[The Testament]]. While navigating the vessel, she has demonstrated an ability to hide herself behind casks and assisted [[Calder]] by identifying that the eyes on the [[Navigator]]'s ship were merely painted. During discussions with [[Calder]] regarding the [[Optasia]], she eventually took on the responsibility of supervising the ship's repairs. Notably, Bliss possesses an immunity to the power of [[Tyrfang]] and maintains the capability to remove Jorin from combat.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a character on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a character who can hide herself behind casks on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a character who helped [[Calder]] identify that the eyes on the [[Navigator]]'s ship were painted.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] speaks to Bliss about the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is immune to the power of [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a [[Guild]] member who issues commands.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss supervised the repair of the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a woman with pale hair and wears a [[Blackwatch coat]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Bliss is a person who could help remove Jorin from the fight.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|As a member of the [[Blackwatch]], Bliss serves as a [[Guild]] Head. While performing guard duty, Bliss utilized rough-forged iron spikes as weapons. During this period, the official sent an urgent message through the Watchman.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Bliss sent an urgent message via the Watchman.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Bliss is on guard duty.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Bliss is of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bliss of the Blackwatch]] is a [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Bliss uses rough-forged iron spikes as weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss, the daughter of [[Nathanael Bareius]], is a notoriously unpredictable individual who carries a bone of Tharlos and possesses a [[Soulbound Vessel]]. After being named Steward, she reported that the last escaping [[Consultants]] were transporting an object and later interacted with [[Calder]] and Cheska to help [[Calder]] utilize the [[Optasia]] safely. While held in cell #4162B, she was poisoned with a substance that inhibited her cognitive functions, though she can cleanse her blood and change her location. Following a nightmare, Bliss was seen among figures ascending into the void and eventually sought refuge in the rigging of [[The Testament]]. Wearing a [[Blackwatch coat]], she remains tucked away in the ship's rigging with the intent to seek revenge against her father.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss has a bone of Tharlos in her pocket.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is a person who might be hiding in a closet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is notoriously unpredictable.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] knows what it is like to meet with Bliss.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is someone [[Calder]] thinks might be able to help.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss has the potential to end the entire conflict on her own.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss was named Steward.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss possesses a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss reported that the last [[Consultants]] to escape were carrying something.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss has stabbed a decorative [[sword]] into a wall.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is a character who interacts with [[Calder]] and Cheska.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is helping [[Calder]] start using the [[Optasia]] without breaking his brain.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss did not dash out of the room when commanded.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss woke from a nightmare.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss's cell label was #4162B.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss has the ability to change her location.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss can cleanse her blood to remove foreign agents.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss was poisoned with a substance that inhibits judgment and cognitive functions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss of the Blackwatch]] is a witness who provided a transcript interview.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss's form was seen among the figures ascending into the void.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss wears a [[Blackwatch coat]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is a character who was tucked away in the rigging of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss is the daughter of [[Nathanael Bareius]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss intends to get revenge on [[Nathanael Bareius]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss stayed curled up in the rigging of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Known for being notoriously unreliable, Bliss of the [[Blackwatch]] carries a black iron spike. During certain periods, there are even suggestions that the individual should be removed. Clad in a [[Blackwatch coat]], Bliss also possesses a spear made of yellowed bone.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bliss is considered notoriously unreliable.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bliss possesses a black iron spike.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There is a suggestion to remove Bliss.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bliss of the Blackwatch]] wears a [[Blackwatch coat]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bliss possesses a spear of yellowed bone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Bliss finally looked up, adding, “I’d like it if he were sane, but I will work with what I can get.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Calder edged closer to Bliss. “Is the Optasia inside the Emperor’s rooms?”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“I have one of Tharlos’ bones in my pocket.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Bliss says the last Consultants to escape were carrying something, but she couldn’t stop them.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“What about you, Bliss? What do you think?”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
